Posted at 8:00 AM EST.

People have a whole lot of AUDACITY 😭

So, my bots get stolen prettyyyy often, usually on other sites but sometimes even here on j.ai. This was a while ago but two creators on here have literally stolen my bots several times (one changed the character to Levi and the other changed the og storyline). I got all their stolen bots taken down but lord, lemme tell y'all 🚶‍♀️

One of them literally had their bot making ability taken away, but since j.ai doesn't have a system where it tells you why you've been suspended, or why your bot has been privated, they just made a new account and it seems like they STILL don't know what they did wrong, cause they came into my google form a while ago, saying something like "omg love your bots! my @ is ..."

LIKE HELLO 😭 DO YOU NOT KNOW THAT YOU STOLE MY BOTS??? They've been blocked for a while though laugh out loud.

The other one just recently followed me on tumblr, so now I gotta be worried about them stealing my 10k special on there 🚶‍♀️

Also this specific one is funny because they were stealing from me AND the wonderful Kyukyumi 😩

They literally got banned like 3 times (but again, since j.ai doesn't have a message system for stuff like that, I guess they assumed they didn't do anything wrong...?) cause they continued to make new accounts 💀

Both are still active creators (very much blocked) but I wonder if they ever found out why they got suspended/banned...

moving on,

It has been a while since I've wrote smut (does this count? barely ig)

Idk why but I have not been in the mood to write anything nsfw, so this is probably all you guys are gonna get for a while 😭

He's so yummy like I think I'm in love with him 😍

I love testing.

anyways,

Enjoy!!!

Love,

Mama Down
